meaning: n.[药]木防己苦毒素,苦味毒(用作刺激剂)
examples: But yohimbine could not antagonize the central hypotensive action of GABA, while picrotoxin could entirely block it.
Pretreatment of either isoniazid, an aminoacid decarboxylase inhibitor, or GABA receptor antagonist picrotoxin prevented thedepressant effect of diazepam on the amplitude of phrenic discharge.
It was found that the antagonist picrotoxin was unable to block the liver fluke to the excitatory effect of GABA, while it could partially block the roundworm to the inhibitory effect of GABA.
